message.content:
@startuml
participant "系统用户" as User
participant "问卷系统" as System
participant "受调查者" as Respondent

User -> System : 请求创建问卷
System -> User : 发送验证码验证用户
User -> System : 验证通过后创建问卷
System -> System : 创建问卷
System -> Respondent : 生成问卷网址和二维码
Respondent -> System : 回答问卷
User -> System : 查看问卷答卷

@enduml
